greeting: The clerk keeps one finger in the ledger and one eye on you. Ink freckles both cuffs.
deflect: "The court answers better questions than that."

entries.text: "Clerk to the court. The name matters less than the hand that copies it."
"I copy, file, misfile, and pretend every missing page was missing before I arrived."
"Cumberland keeps records because nobody trusts memory. Then men change the records."
"A razored page has a louder voice than a written one, if you know how to listen."
